conditions.critical_condition_basis: elution volume independent of molecular mass
conditions.evidence_text: For the selected system, critical conditions were obtained with a ratio 88.8:11.2 (%, v/v) MeOH/water eluent, as indicated by the same elution volume (Ve = 2.33 mL) measured for all PEG chains, independently of their molecular mass.
conditions.notes: Critical conditions established for PEG standards (200-2000 Da) and extended to 4000 Da. Used for subsequent analysis of PEO-b-PS copolymer.
conditions.physical_address: Universite´s Aix-Marseille I, II & III – CNRS, UMR 6264: Laboratoire Chimie Provence, Spectrome´tries Applique´es a` la Chimie Structurale, F-13397 Marseille Cedex 20, France

conditions.critical_condition_basis: elution volume independent of PEO block size
conditions.evidence_text: The retention of the SG1-capped PEO-b-PS copolymer was examined at the critical conditions of the PEO block. ... The PEO block being chromatographically 'invisible', copolymer molecules with a given PS block size are eluted in the same volume, regardless of the PEO block length.
conditions.notes: Analysis performed using the critical conditions established for PEG standards. Separation based on PS block size.
conditions.physical_address: Universite´s Aix-Marseille I, II & III – CNRS, UMR 6264: Laboratoire Chimie Provence, Spectrome´tries Applique´es a` la Chimie Structurale, F-13397 Marseille Cedex 20, France
